summary: 01_title 'one full FRQ per exam' claim removed and replaced with the documented Unit 8 weighting (10-15% MC) plus softer 'shows up regularly on Section II' phrasing — supported by the AP CED reference. 19_path OpenStax reference softened to 'chapter six — volumes by slicing' which is generic enough to be safe under any edition's section numbering. Remaining notes (Unit 8b GIIS internal designation, Module 12 next-up) are stylistic GIIS-internal claims that match the established Module 10 pattern. No blocking citation issues.
